signals.headline: Kerala Assembly Polling Concludes Peacefully on April 9 with 75
signals.raw:
Kerala Assembly Polling Concludes Peacefully on April 9 with 75.01% Turnout | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polling for all 140 seats in the Kerala Legislative Assembly election ended on April 9, 2026, with a voter turnout of 75.01% by 5 PM—slightly higher than the 74.06% in 2021—marking a peaceful process across over 30,000 stations.[4] No results, seat tallies, or government formations have been anno

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 inflation rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 inflation rises to 2.16% YoY | NO** | **MED confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.16% in March 2026 from 2.00% in February 2026, with monthly inflation at 0.34%.[2] This is the most recent data point available as of April 17, 2026, showing a modest uptick but no major announcement or resolution today that would significantly shift prediction marke
